name: CORIANDER, GARLIC AND CHILLI RAITA
intro: My favourite raita. Nothing more to be said.

ingredients.item: Bunch of fresh coriander (cilantro), leaves only
fresh green chillies, or to taste, roughly chopped

method: In a spice grinder or small food processor, blend the coriander (cilantro) leaves, garlic, lime juice and chillies to a paste. You can also use a pestle and mortar to do this, which is a little more work.
Whisk the yoghurt with a fork until creamy smooth, then stir in the coriander paste. Season with salt to taste and chill in the fridge for about 30 minutes before serving.
